content: Autonomous agentic AI can be redesigned to use a 2025 Iterative Curiosity Modulation (ICM) mechanism that frames long-term goal pursuit as a series of active curiosity-driven exploration cycles, instead of static planned execution. This replaces the common paradigm of top-down objective alignment with a bottom-up system where intrinsic curiosity modulates the agent’s goal priorities to explore unforeseen high-impact opportunities that align with the agent’s core values.
